approaches.title: Bitwise complement using a highest-bit mask
approaches.summary: Constructs a mask covering all significant bits of n, then XORs n with the mask; handles zero separately.

revisions.shortChangeSummary: Uses leading_zeros() to construct the mask in constant time.

revisions.commitBody:
marginally slower than leading_zeros() on cpu architectures that support
it, but still O(1)

time: O(1)
space: O(1)
revisions.shortChangeSummary: Replaces leading_zeros() with bit smearing to propagate the highest set bit through the mask.
